system.description: Bayer was a rail jack fired for being drunk. Over years, he built a crew with one mission in mind — robbing a train. When Iruvia completed negotiations with Akoros to buy an unprecedented mass of leviathan blood to pour into industrialization, Bayer's crew hit the train carrying the payment, sabotaging a bridge. Rescuers found the train in the canyon, but no gold — an impossible feat. Bayer's crew vanished.
system.additional_info: An Iruvian ingot stamped with the year '802' will attract attention.
